name: Nrf2-mediated proteasome activation in human fibroblast senescence
summary: In vitro human fibroblast experiments testing whether Nrf2 activation by 18alpha-glycyrrhetinic acid can raise proteasome activity and delay senescence phenotypes.
model_system: Human embryonic fibroblast cultures undergoing replicative senescence, with Nrf2-functional and Nrf2-impaired cell systems
